SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf.machines.mips

Enum Class ElfRelocationType_Mips

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ElfRelocationType_Mips>
net.boricj.bft.elf.machines.mips.ElfRelocationType_Mips
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ElfRelocationType_Mips>, Constable, ElfRelocationType
public enum ElfRelocationType_Mips extends Enum<ElfRelocationType_Mips> implements ElfRelocationType
MIPS relocation types. These constants define the relocation mechanisms specific to the MIPS architecture.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    R_MIPS_16
    Direct 16-bit.
    R_MIPS_26
    Direct 26-bit shifted.
    R_MIPS_32
    Direct 32-bit.
    R_MIPS_64
    Direct 64-bit.
    R_MIPS_ADD_IMMEDIATE
    Add immediate instruction relocation.
    R_MIPS_CALL_HI16
    High 16 bits of call displacement.
    R_MIPS_CALL_LO16
    Low 16 bits of call displacement.
    R_MIPS_CALL16
    16-bit GOT entry for function.
    R_MIPS_DELETE
    Delete field instruction.
    R_MIPS_GOT_DISP
    GOT displacement.
    R_MIPS_GOT_HI16
    High 16 bits of GOT entry.
    R_MIPS_GOT_LO16
    Low 16 bits of GOT entry.
    R_MIPS_GOT_OFST
    Offset within GOT page.
    R_MIPS_GOT_PAGE
    Page number of GOT page.
    R_MIPS_GOT16
    16-bit GOT entry.
    R_MIPS_GPREL16
    GP relative 16-bit.
    R_MIPS_GPREL32
    GP relative 32-bit.
    R_MIPS_HI16
    High 16 bits of symbol value.
    R_MIPS_HIGHER
    Higher 16 bits of 48-bit value.
    R_MIPS_HIGHEST
    Highest 16 bits of 48-bit value.
    R_MIPS_INSERT_A
    Insert "A" field instruction.
    R_MIPS_INSERT_B
    Insert "B" field instruction.
    R_MIPS_JALR
    Jump and link register optimization.
    R_MIPS_LITERAL
    16-bit literal entry.
    R_MIPS_LO16
    Low 16 bits of symbol value.
    R_MIPS_NONE
    No relocation.
    R_MIPS_PC16
    PC relative 16-bit shifted.
    R_MIPS_PJUMP
    Jump relocation.
    R_MIPS_REL16
    PC relative 16-bit.
    R_MIPS_REL32
    PC relative 32-bit.
    R_MIPS_RELGOT
    Relative GOT relocation.
    R_MIPS_SCN_DISP
    Section displacement.
    R_MIPS_SHIFT5
    Direct 5-bit shift.
    R_MIPS_SHIFT6
    Direct 6-bit shift.
    R_MIPS_SUB
    Subtraction.
    R_MIPS_UNUSED1
    Unused relocation type 1.
    R_MIPS_UNUSED2
    Unused relocation type 2.
    R_MIPS_UNUSED3
    Unused relocation type 3.
